description: Buyer resale transaction cadence. Steps are day-offset from contract acceptance or trigger-based on external events.
follow_up_rule: Never let more than 1 business day pass without following up on open items.

steps.title: Send Accepted Offer Email to Buyer
steps.notes: Send immediately after offer is accepted. CC referring agent if applicable.

steps.title: Send Home Inspection Options to Buyer
steps.notes: Send same day. Buyer needs to choose an inspector. CC referring agent if applicable.

steps.condition: contract includes seller-paid home warranty / Home Protection Plan
steps.title: Send Home Warranty Options to Buyer
steps.notes: CANONICAL: Always attach all 4 brochures from assets/home-warranty-brochures/. Always use the wording from shared.md. Only variables are [PROPERTY ADDRESS], [BUYER FIRST NAME], and [WARRANTY CREDIT] (dollar amount). CC referring agent if applicable.

steps.title: Create All Calendar Events from Contract
steps.notes: Add COE, all contingency deadlines, earnest money deadline to calendar.json. See shared.md for full list.

steps.condition: buyer has NOT responded to inspection options
steps.title: Follow Up on Inspection Choice
steps.notes: Send 1 business day after inspection options email if no response.

steps.title: Send SRPD to Buyer
steps.notes: Forward the signed SRPD to buyer. CC referring agent if applicable.

steps.title: Introduction Email to All Transaction Parties
steps.notes: Send once escrow officer info is obtained (escrow + lender + referring agent if applicable).

steps.title: Send W9 to Escrow
steps.notes: Attach Real Broker LLC W9. Can send same day as intro email.

steps.title: Send Preliminary Title Report to Buyer
steps.notes: Forward prelim PDF to buyer with template explanation.

steps.title: Add Inspection Date to Calendar
steps.notes: Add confirmed inspection date/time to calendar.json.

steps.title: Add Final Walkthrough to Calendar
steps.notes: Usually within 3 calendar days prior to COE. Add to calendar.json.

steps.title: Add Signing Appointment to Calendar
steps.notes: Add signing date/time to calendar.json. Attend all signings.

steps.title: Request Final Settlement Statement + Proof of Commission Payment
steps.notes: Send same day escrow confirms recording (reply to their 'We Are Recorded' email). Requests buyer-side and combined final settlement statements + commission wire/check confirmation. Buyer side routes to REAL/Urban Nest back office unless deal-specific routing differs.
